description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a sprawling, L-shaped footprint and a large attached garage or carport. The house features a hip roof with multiple ridges and a prominent central chimney. The main entrance is accentuated by a small porch with steps and columns, leading to a bay window that adds architectural interest to the front facade. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker, shingled roof. Windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with several standard rectangular windows and a distinctive bay window at the front. The attached garage or carport has a wide opening and is supported by wooden posts, providing covered parking or storage space.
description: A single-story L-shaped house with a hip roof, central chimney, bay window, and an attached garage or carport. The light-colored exterior contrasts with the dark roof, and the entryway features a small porch with columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with steps, columns, and a bay window, as well as the attached garage/carport to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the connection between the main building and the garage, and multiple windows along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the garage doors, back entrance, and the extended roofline over the garage section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the open carport area with supporting posts and the side of the main house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with small porch, steps, columns, and a bay window
